hero.title: Trip Cost Calculator
hero.description: Plan, record, compare, and review the total cost of trips across travelers, distance, and expense categories.

flow.title: Trips → Cost Items → Comparison → Insights
steps: Create trips with travelers and distance
Compare trips and review spending insights

differences.title: Understand the full cost of a trip
differences.description: Trip Cost Calculator keeps trip budgets and actual costs in one private workspace.

items.title: Start with the journey
items.description: Record destination, dates, travelers, vehicle, distance, currency, and notes.

items.title: Capture expense details
items.description: Add fuel, parking, tolls, food, accommodation, tickets, shopping, transport, and miscellaneous costs.

items.title: Compare and learn
items.description: See total cost, cost per traveler, cost per kilometer, category breakdowns, and monthly activity.

feel.title: A practical companion for travel planning
feel.description: The workflow is built for quick entry, clear comparison, and calm review after trips.

items.title: Grounded
items.description: Trips and costs are user-entered records, not live booking or payment data.

items.title: Comparable
items.description: Different trips can be reviewed side by side using consistent cost metrics.

items.title: Private
items.description: Records are scoped to the authenticated user.

audiences.title: Who uses Trip Cost Calculator
audiences.description: Useful for people who want to understand the actual cost of travel before and after a trip.

items.title: Drivers
items.description: Track fuel, toll, parking, and vehicle-related trip costs.

items.title: Families
items.description: Estimate and review costs per traveler.

items.title: Frequent travelers
items.description: Compare recurring trips and category patterns.

resourceSection.title: Trip cost essentials
resourceSection.description: Core records stay focused on trips, costs, comparison, and insights.

items.title: Trip records
items.description: Name, route, dates, travelers, vehicle, distance, currency, and notes.

items.title: Cost items
items.description: Categorized expense records attached to trips.

items.title: Insight summaries
items.description: Totals, averages, categories, monthly spend, and recent activity.

groupedSection.title: From estimate to review
groupedSection.description: The app supports both planning and post-trip analysis.

items.name: Route
items.description: Capture where the trip starts and ends.

items.name: Travelers
items.description: Calculate cost per traveler from saved expense items.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Review which cost types drive the trip total.

items.name: Distance
items.description: Use distance to calculate cost per kilometer.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with Ansiversa workflow standards
technicalSection.description: Trip Cost Calculator uses protected routes, owner-scoped APIs, isolated persistence, and shared UI patterns.
items: Overview metadata follows the shared catalog contract.

finalCta.title: Open Trip Cost Calculator
finalCta.description: Start with Trips, then add cost items and compare spending.
